action.reasoning: Observation: Data verified - 76863 train, 19915 val, regions heavily skewed (Europe=3 dominant in train, Africa=0 and Oceania=4 are minorities). Worst-region likely Africa or Oceania. Analysis: Need CLIP-based fine-tuning with attention to minority regions. FLYP (fine-tune like you pretrain) uses contrastive loss with class name text embeddings - shown to be SOTA on FMoW-WILDS. Decision: Start with simple but effective approach: CLIP-B/16 linear probe + fine-tune with class-balanced loss. Build pipeline first, train 1-2 epochs, eval to measure time.
